cartoons.image_alt: A person watches TV while it is snowing outside. The TV shows a shining sun and a banner on the image reads “Fake News.”
cartoons.author: Mick Stevens
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Thursday, March 12th

humor_links.title: How to be a mysterious woman who is also in bed by 9:30 P.M.
I’ll have kids in a few years, when I’m successful and wealthy and my life is finally perfect.
I am a Tinder guy holding a fish, and I will provide for you.
The most effective group-chat-ending texts.
Common anatomies of disappointing men.
Behold, I have returned from a hike.

cartoons.image_alt: A woman walks down a street on a sunny day with a gas station in the background.
cartoons.caption: "I thought I’d walk to work because the weather is nice, and because I abandoned my car at the gas station when I saw the prices."
